title: AesKey::gcm_encrypt IV length is advisory, not enforced; error will be opaque
description: gcm_encrypt doc says 'iv should be 12 bytes for GCM' — using 'should' implies it's a recommendation. wolfHSM GCM requires exactly 12 bytes (96-bit IV is the only standardized non-length-computation path); other lengths will cause the server to return an error with no indication the IV length was wrong. Change 'should' to 'must be exactly 12 bytes'. Optionally add a Rust check: if iv.len() != 12 { return Err(...) } with a message.
